name: Daniel Betancourt
role: Senior Software Engineer | APIs (REST / SOAP) | Microservices / Microfrontends | Technical Consultant | Data Engineer
tagline: Senior software engineer building scalable backend systems, distributed APIs, and cloud-native services.
summary: Senior Software Engineer with strong experience designing and building scalable backend systems, distributed APIs, and high-performance enterprise applications. Focused on robust .NET and Java solutions, microservices, system integrations, and data-driven platforms. Experienced with REST/SOAP/gRPC, event-driven systems (AMQP/RabbitMQ), WebSockets, AWS, Docker/Kubernetes, and SQL/NoSQL databases.
